creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Like last time, this is not a problem report but a request for help. On 
doc@FreeBSD.org there are people working with documentation, on 
freebsd-geom@freebsd.org there are people working with the GEOM 
framework (which could be used for RAID-1 for example) on 
questions@freebsd.org there are people that are willing to help you 
troubleshooting your problems. But as mentioned before, this is not a 
Problem Report so it shouldn't be in the GNATSdb at all. Thank you for 
using FreeBSD and I hope you find what you need on the various 
mailinglists.
